import pytest
from myapp.db import get_session
from myapp.models import User


@pytest.fixture
def db_session():
    session = get_session()
    yield session
    session.rollback()
    session.close()


def test_create_user(db_session):
    user = User(name="testuser", email="test@example.com")
    db_session.add(user)
    db_session.commit()
    assert user.id is not None


def test_update_user_role(db_session):
    user = User(name="testuser", email="test@example.com")
    db_session.add(user)
    db_session.flush()
    user.role = "admin"
    db_session.commit()
    assert user.role == "admin"


def test_create_bulk_orders(db_session):
    for i in range(100):
        order = Order(user_id=1, amount=i * 10.0)
        db_session.add(order)
    db_session.commit()
    count = db_session.query(Order).count()
    assert count >= 100
